premise: I sold my $50,000 cherry-red pickup and handed my grandmother’s 100-year-old pie recipe to my daughter launching a food truck, trusting her written 30% profit share, but she franchised without me and sold the brand for $1.2 million, claiming the recipe was a gift. I sued for contract breach, won a $360,000 settlement plus perpetual royalties, and now run a rival truck serving ‘Unkept Promise Pies’ with every receipt printed with the court docket number.

thumb.label: Thumbnail + metadata
thumb.detail: My Daughter Stole My Pie Recipe, Cut Me Out Of $1.2M. So I Served Pies With The
